scripts.build: doppler run --no-cache -- pnpm exec vite build
scripts.deploy: doppler run --no-cache --project agents --config prd -- pnpm exec tsx ./alchemy.run.ts
scripts.destroy: doppler run --no-cache --project agents --config prd -- pnpm exec tsx ./alchemy.run.ts --destroy
scripts.test:e2e: doppler run --no-cache -- pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:mocked-internet: doppler run --no-cache -- pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts --tags-filter mocked-internet
scripts.test:e2e:preview: node -e "if (!process.env.AGENTS_BASE_URL) { console.error('AGENTS_BASE_URL is required for agents preview e2e tests'); process.exit(1); }" && env AGENTS_E2E_RUNTIME_SMOKE=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts --tags-filter deployed-live-worker
scripts.test:e2e:record: doppler run --no-cache -- env AGENTS_E2E_RECORD_HAR=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts --tags-filter mocked-internet
scripts.test:e2e:runtime-smoke: doppler run --no-cache -- sh -c 'if [ -z "$AGENTS_BASE_URL" ]; then echo "AGENTS_BASE_URL is required"; exit 1; fi; export AGENTS_E2E_RUNTIME_SMOKE=1; pnpm exec vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts --tags-filter deployed-live-worker'
